prompt: A clean technical infographic of a media processing pipeline on a dark navy background. Seven numbered stages flow top to bottom connected by arrows. Stage 1 Download with a cloud icon, Stage 2 Extract splitting into speech-to-text and OCR paths, Stage 3 Write as a large central AI brain node, then four output arrows fan out to Stage 4 TTS with a speaker icon, Stage 5 Image with a paintbrush, Stage 6 Video with a film reel, Stage 7 Music with a note. Teal for inputs, gold for the AI stage, coral and purple for outputs. Flat design, geometric shapes, minimal text, monospace labels, developer documentation style.

evidence.summary: generated-image-openai-gpt-image-2.png: Clean, readable technical infographic closely matching the requested media processing pipeline with correct stages, colors, icons, arrows, and monospace labels.
strengths: All seven numbered stages are present and arranged in a clear top-to-bottom flow.
Extract correctly branches into Speech-to-Text and OCR paths before merging into the AI Write stage.
Central AI brain node is prominent and gold, with four output arrows fanning to TTS, Image, Video, and Music.
Dark navy background, flat geometric style, teal/gold/coral/purple palette, and developer-documentation feel are well executed.
Text is legible and mostly accurate.
issues: Stage 3 is more of a large labeled box containing the AI brain rather than the brain as the central node itself.
The OCR branch redundantly shows 'OCR' twice due to icon text plus label.
Output arrows are clean but somewhat stylized with a shared trunk rather than distinctly originating from the AI brain node.
